notes: Hand-authored OpenAPI 3.0.3 subset of the CHT Core / Medic REST API. The cht adaptor exposes only generic HTTP verbs (get/post/put/request) against a CHT instance, so operations here reflect the concrete CHT REST endpoints those calls target, derived from the @openapi JSDoc annotations in medic/cht-core api/src/controllers (person.js, place.js, contact.js, records.js, settings.js, export-data.js, monitoring.js, users.js, routing.js) and the adaptor's own examples (POST /api/v1/people, GET /api/v2/export/contacts, PUT /api/v1/settings). CHT's real machine spec is generated at build time (scripts/build/generate-openapi.js, OpenAPI 3.1.0) but is not published to a stable URL, so this is marked origin=generated / upstreamFormat=docs. Caveats: (1) upstream uses 3.1.0 features (const, deep oneOf, cht-datasource $refs) that were down-converted to 3.0.3 and simplified. (2) Export endpoints (/api/v2/export/contacts) actually return text/csv; modelled here as application/json arrays so the mocker can seed collections. (3) Person/Place/Contact document schemas are representative approximations of CHT CouchDB docs, not the exact cht-datasource schemas. (4) Base server uses an {instance} variable defaulting to demo.app.medicmobile.org; auth is HTTP basic in real CHT and omitted here.
